title: Good Luck, Babe!
why_this_song: Good Luck, Babe! by Chappell Roan (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Well, good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling
You can say that we are nothing, but you know the truth
With her arms out like an angel through the car sunroof

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "good" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "good" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "luck" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "luck" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Make a new excuse, another stupid reason

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Good Luck, Babe!" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Good Luck, Babe!" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Good Luck, Babe!" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Good Luck, Babe!", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Good Luck, Babe!" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Good Luck, Babe!" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Good Luck, Babe!" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Good Luck, Babe!" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Good Luck, Babe!" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Good Luck, Babe!" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
